author: Tim Rice <tim.j.rice@hackrange.com>
name: sqli_boolean
summary: Boolean-based SQL injection confirmation via response-difference analysis.

args.--url: Target URL with the parameter to test (required)
args.--param: Name of the parameter to inject into (required)
args.--cookie: Cookie header value for authenticated tests
args.--time-based: Fall back to time-based detection if boolean inconclusive
args.--time-threshold: Seconds delta to consider time-based confirmed (default 4.0)
